holdings.infoBox: AOTS is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.69%, Amazon.com at 7.39%, Apple at 7.38%, NVIDIA at 7.27%, and Microsoft at 6.30%.

overview.description: The AOT Software Platform ETF (AOTS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the AOT VettaFi Software Platform index. The fund is passively managed to provide exposure to US companies considered to be building the foundation of modern digital applications and software platforms. Holdings are weighted by profitability and efficiency AOTS was launched on Dec 22, 2025 and is issued by AOT.
